task.title: EPIC: Commander-Shim Removal — Native Citty CLI Migration
task.description: Remove commander-shim.ts and migrate all 114 command files to native citty command definitions. The shim bridges old Commander-style command authoring to citty runtime execution. Blast radius: 128 files (114 commands, 2 help system, 1 entrypoint, 1 shim definition, 20 tests). Prerequisites: registry ParamDef enrichment, help system rewrite, command-by-command migration in batches. Only 1 command (code.ts) is currently native citty.
acceptance: All 114 command files use native citty defineCommand
help-generator.ts and help-renderer.ts work without ShimCommand
All 20 test files updated to not reference ShimCommand
Build passes and biome CI clean
notes: 2026-04-16 05:02:38 UTC: Audit 2026-04-15: commander-shim CONFIRMED still heavily wired. Evidence: 113 source .ts files in packages/cleo/src/ use ShimCommand. index.ts TODO line 6 references 'Migrate all 89 commands to native citty pattern'. 34 caamp package files use commander directly. ShimCommand is the ACTIVE implementation bridging all commands to citty runtime. Only 1 command (code.ts) is native citty per T487 description. Real future work — keep pending, medium priority.
